name: financial-copilot
description: Proactive financial advisor: subscription audit, client concentration, seasonal patterns, pricing suggestions, multi-year tax planning

tools.name: subscription_audit
tools.description: Identify recurring expenses and flag unused/overpriced subscriptions

tools.name: client_concentration
tools.description: Analyze revenue concentration risk across clients

tools.name: seasonal_patterns
tools.description: Detect seasonal revenue/expense patterns and recommend cash reserves

tools.name: pricing_suggestions
tools.description: Analyze effective hourly rates and suggest pricing changes

tools.name: multi_year_tax_plan
tools.description: Model tax liability across multiple years for strategic decisions
